category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Serbia EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入塞尔维亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入塞爾維亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Serbia CE-aligned product expectations, TS EN IEC 61851 technical alignment, AERS charging service and market rules, EMS connection expectations, connector compatibility, OCPP, and safety / EMC evidence.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与塞尔维亚 CE 对齐产品要求、TS EN IEC 61851技术对应、AERS充电服务与市场规则、EMS连接要求、接口兼容性、OCPP以及安全/EMC证据差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與塞爾維亞 CE 對齊產品要求、TS EN IEC 61851技術對應、AERS充電服務與市場規則、EMS連接要求、接口相容性、OCPP以及安全/EMC證據差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, CE scope determination, ISS standards interpretation, AERS licensing assessment, EMS grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charging-network operators, and installers should verify current Serbia CE, ISS/EN standards, AERS, EMS, electrical-installation, data, payment, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, installation, or operation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、CE适用范围裁定、ISS标准解释、AERS许可评审、EMS并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电网络运营方和安装方在出货、销售、安装或运营前，应与合格专业人士核实现行塞尔维亚CE、ISS/EN标准、AERS、EMS、电气安装、数据、支付及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、CE適用範圍裁定、ISS標準解釋、AERS許可評審、EMS併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電網絡營運方和安裝方在出貨、銷售、安裝或營運前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行塞爾維亞CE、ISS/EN標準、AERS、EMS、電氣安裝、資料、支付及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Serbia, the main practical gaps are CE technical-file and declaration work for applicable EU-aligned product legislation, TS EN IEC 61851 technical alignment, Type 2 / CCS2 connector configuration per project deployment and fleet expectation, AERS charging-network licensing for public charging service operations, EMS connection review, OCPP backend interoperability, and EMC / residual-current protection evidence. A blanket whole-unit mandatory national certificate should not be assumed without checking the exact model, voltage, installation route, and use case with Serbian authorities or a qualified local conformity professional.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造充电桩进入塞尔维亚时，主要实际差距包括适用欧盟协调产品法规下的CE技术文件与符合性声明、TS EN IEC 61851技术对应、项目部署和车队要求决定的Type2或CCS2接口配置、公共充电服务运营的AERS充电网络许可、EMS并网审查、OCPP后台互操作，以及EMC/剩余电流保护证据。不应在未向塞尔维亚主管机关或合格本地合规专业人士核实具体型号、电压、安装路径和用途前，假定存在统一的整机强制国家证书。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造充電樁進入塞爾維亞時，主要實際差距包括適用歐盟協調產品法規下的CE技術文件與符合性聲明、TS EN IEC 61851技術對應、按項目部署與車隊需求決定的Type 2或CCS2接口配置、公共充電服務營運的AERS充電網路許可、EMS並網審查、OCPP後台互操作，以及EMC/剩餘電流保護證據。不應在未向塞爾維亞主管機關或合格本地合規專業人士核實具體型號、電壓、安裝路徑和用途前，假定存在統一的整機強制國家證書。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, government gazette, grid operator, conformity assessment body, customs authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
